title: Vegapunk’s Message Begins
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kuma, Atlas, Unknown person #8, Bonney as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think we marines have to fire on our own weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's with the water- works?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why wouldn't I be crying, you idiot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been looking for you for so long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm? But I've been here the whole time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure, but I didn't know you were Nika!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Neekah? What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah, what's the deal with that flimsy punch you tried to throw earlier?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I was going for a big rubbery attack like you!! If it's so flimsy, why don't you show me how it's done?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give that old windbag a good one for vegapunk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then we can get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of you filthy cockroaches have a right to live now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Alright, Bonney! Sounds like a plan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For the record, this...

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: ...Is how you punch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ungh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GUM- GUM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Booming Dawn...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...GATLING!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're gonna have to use those legs if you wanna get out of here, Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hover function should still work while we're on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go, vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: go on without me, BONNEY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IVE BEEN A DOCTOR FOR LONG ENOUGH TO KNOW THAT IF I MOVE NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'LL DIE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
